retry_reason: Put operation: failure indicates use-after-free or double-put; retrying would be dangerous.
contract_summary: This function removes the adjacency relationship between two net_devices by unlinking both directions from the respective adjacency lists and decrementing the reference counts of the adjacency objects. It is the release (put) counterpart to a prior get operation (e.g., when the adjacency was established). After this call, the adjacency entries are eliminated, and the caller must not use the removed entries. The function returns void and assumes valid input; it is an unconditional release step in the adjacency lifecycle.
